result:
All 6 tests pass. There were two bugs in `lrucache/cache.py`:

1. **`get` didn't refresh recency** — a hit returned the value but never moved the entry to the end of the `OrderedDict`, so recently-read keys could still be evicted as least-recently-used. Fixed by adding `self._data.move_to_end(key)` on a non-expired hit.
2. **`put` evicted on in-place updates** — the eviction check ran even when the key already existed, so overwriting a key in a full cache wrongly dropped another entry. Fixed by only evicting when the key is new.

Both fixes are in `lrucache/cache.py:30-34`, and the explanation is written up in `SOLUTION.md`.
